title.en: Ye Tian understood as soon as he heard it.

content.en:
"Taisu Palace Master, you're not kidding, are you? The Supreme Dao Strange Thing that contains the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, its strength is comparable to that of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian didn't quite believe that the Taisu Palace Master could do it, but he still had some expectations.

The Taisu Palace Lord said with a smile: "The strange things of the Supreme Dao are very weird, although the strength is very strong, but the weaknesses are also obvious, such as weakening the connection between the strange figures and the strange things of the Supreme Dao, you can weaken their strength." Taisu Palace really has no way to weaken the strength of the Sevenfold Dao Realm to the Dao Strange Thing to the Sixfold Dao Realm, but the other Innate Origin Domains have the power to create a seven-pattern Dao weapon, and it is very special, and only by comprehending the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao can it be urged. "

Ye Tian understood as soon as he heard it.

Only the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule can urge that Seven-Pattern Supreme Dao weapon, and that will not be of much use.

First of all, a place like the Fourth Strange Land of the Infinite Domain is only allowed to enter the Fifth Rank Dao Realm at most, and how rare it is to comprehend the Seventh Sequence of Extreme Dao rules in the Fifth Rank Dao Realm, even if you use this Seven Patterns Extreme Dao Weapon to limit the strength of the Dao Strange Thing, you can't kill the Dao Strange Thing!

The Taisu Palace Master continued: "This seven-pattern supreme dao weapon can weaken the seven-fold supreme dao strange thing to the top six-fold supreme dao realm strength, with your strength, it shouldn't be difficult to kill such a supreme dao strange thing." Our Taisu Palace can pay a big price to buy such a seven-pattern supreme dao weapon, but there must be some gains for such a payment, so you need to pay some seventh-sequence supreme dao rule items in the Taisu Palace, at least no less than 30 pieces!"

30 items of the seventh sequence of the Dao rules, this is enough to make the Wuji Heavenly Palace crazy!

However, the Taisu Palace Master was able to obtain more seventh-sequence supreme dao rule items, and this seventh-sequence supreme dao rule item was definitely willing to take it out.

Really.

Ye Tian didn't think about it, and directly agreed.

"Taisu Palace Master, I agree!"

Ye Tian immediately responded.

Anyway, this deal is not bad for him as long as it is good.

If the Taisu Palace Master didn't help him get that kind of seven-pattern supreme dao weapon, he wouldn't even want to get the seventh sequence supreme dao rule item.

"Ye Tian, you wait for a few days first, and then I'll go and buy that kind of Seven Pattern Supreme Dao weapon. "

Subsequently.

The Taisu Palace Master left.

Without a Taisu Palace Master, the impact is not very great, Taisu Palace and other forces can shrink their strength, and Wuji Heavenly Palace cannot break through Taisu Palace.

Moreover, Ye Tian could also take the opportunity to harass him, making Wuji Heavenly Palace extremely jealous.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the Taisu Palace Master finally returned.

However, at this time, the Taisu Palace Master was not lightly injured.

When Ye Tian saw the Taisu Palace Master, he obviously felt that the other party's aura was sluggish, and it was estimated that he had been intercepted and killed, which was the only time he was traumatized.

"Ye Tian, this is the seven-vein supreme dao weapon-blood pattern stele, once the blood vein stele is sacrificed, it can suppress the strength of the sevenfold to the dao realm to the dao strange thing. Remember, the Blood Tattoo Tablet is just that, don't lose it. "Taisu Palace Master said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian took the Blood Pattern Tablet and left.

After that, he began to refine the Blood Tattoo Stele.

It took him a little time, and he completely refined the Blood Pattern Tablet.

And after refining, he found that this seven-pattern supreme dao weapon was too mysterious, and it couldn't penetrate inside, so he couldn't do it if he wanted to.

"That's right, this kind of seven-pattern supreme dao weapon must not be easily refined, otherwise the Taisu Palace Master would not have paid a big price to acquire it!" Ye Tian muttered.

Now that the Blood Pattern Tablet has been refined, he has to go to the Fourth Strange Land.

......

The Fourth Odd Land.

This strange land is called the strange land of the river of blood, not that the whole strange land is a river of blood, but that the void of the strange land contains the vision of the river of blood, which is spread all over the strange land, and the vision of the river of blood is the embodiment of the rules, which can be snooped but cannot be touched.

At this time.

The Wuji Heavenly Palace had already given up on the Fourth Strange Land, and it didn't dare to send people to garrison it.

Of course.

Taisu Palace didn't dare to garrison, it was too close to Wuji Heavenly Palace, if it was stationed, it would undoubtedly be attacked by the Supreme Dao Realm of Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Swish!

Ye Tian came here and directly entered the Blood River Strange Land.

Of course, when he entered the Blood River Wonderland, he also left a replica body in the outside world.

Airplanes!

In the strange land of the blood river, Ye Tian came in.

After coming in, Ye Tian began to copy more copies of the body.

It didn't take long for a real replica body to condense.

At this time, he began to use the Great Ghost River Secret Technique to find the most strange things.

"There's a supreme strange thing over there, and the breath is terrifying!"

Ye Tian could sense the aura of that Dao strange thing far beyond him, and he could definitely kill him easily.

If there was no Blood Tattoo Tablet, he wouldn't dare to trouble the other party.

Soon, Ye Tian found that Dao strange thing.

This strange object is very common and familiar.

"The Profound Drum of the Dao Strange Things!"

Before, he had encountered this kind of supreme strange thing in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and now he had encountered it again.

However, the aura of this Xuanming Drum has reached the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and it exudes terrifying Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao rules all over its body, which is far from being comparable to those Supreme Dao Strange Things in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and the gap is too big.

"Blood Tattoo Tablet!"

Ye Tian urged the Blood Pattern Tablet with all his strength, and a strange fluctuation emanated, enveloping the Xuanming Drum.

In an instant, the aura of the strange figure of the Xuan Ming Drum began to decline, rapidly descending from the seventh-fold Dao realm to the sixth-fold Dao realm.

"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Immediately, another of his replica bodies struck at the Xuan Ming Drum.

It's not impossible for him to urge the copy body of the Blood Pattern Tablet to fight, but it will undoubtedly affect his strength, so it's better to maintain the Blood Pattern Tablet with all his might, so that he can kill the Xuanming Drum faster.

Bang!!!!!

After fighting a few moves, Xuan Minggu wanted to escape.

However, Ye Tian would not let it escape.

Shout!

The spear carrying the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules was pointed on the Xuanming Drum, causing the Xuanming Drum to begin to crack.

Next, the dense spears penetrated all things in time and space, hitting the Xuanming Drum one by one, no matter how the Xuanying Drum used the seventh sequence of supreme rules to protect the body, they were still shattered by the seventh sequence of supreme rules.

Finally.

The Xuanming Drum was completely shattered, and the strange figure dissipated.

"It's great to kill a sevenfold Dao realm supreme dao artifact!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed a fragment from it, which was the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao Rule fragment.

Just such a fragment was enough for the strength of Wuji Heavenly Palace and Taisu Palace to compete for, so that the Seven Realms and Dao Realm would have to fight for it, and he could easily obtain such a fragment now.

"However, this kind of thing is estimated to be very ordinary for the Taibai Sword Master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, when he cultivated to reach the Fourfold Dao Realm, he could kill such a Dao Treasure without the help of the Blood Pattern Tablet.

It's a pity that it will take a long time for him to break through to the Fourfold Dao Realm, and he can't wait.
